response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:41: Identified as an introductory talk between Tokoyami Towa and Kazama Iroha. 2. 00:41: The song '第ゼロ感' (Dai Zero Kan) begins. On-screen text identifies the composer as TAKUMA. 3. Used search tool with query '第ゼロ感 10-FEET lyrics' to identify the song and its original artist (10-FEET). 4. Located original Japanese lyrics and provided a corresponding English translation.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory segment with two VTubers, Tokoyami Towa and Kazama Iroha, followed by their vocal performance of the song '第ゼロ感' (Dai Zero Kan) by 10-FEET.

scenes.description: The two VTubers, Tokoyami Towa and Kazama Iroha, stand on stage and greet the audience. No vocal music is playing.
Tokoyami Towa and Kazama Iroha perform the song '第ゼロ感'. The stage lighting and background visuals are dynamic.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
群れを逸れて夢を咥えた
それが最後になる気がしたんだ
獣は砂を一握り撒いた
それが最後になる気がしたんだ

不確かな夢叶えるのさ 約束の夜に
微かな風に願うのさ 静寂の朝に
遠い星の少年は
その腕に約束の飾り
まだ旅路の最中さ 幻惑の園に
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The herd strayed and bit into a dream
I felt like it would be the last time
The beast scattered a handful of sand
I felt like it would be the last time

I will make my uncertain dream come true, on the promised night
I wish upon a faint breeze, on the quiet morning
The boy from a distant star
has the promise's decoration on his arm
He is still in the middle of the journey, in the garden of illusion
